pros: Excels in complex coding and debugging with detailed, accurate outputs.
High general knowledge accuracy with minimal hallucinations.
Produces coherent, contextually appropriate creative content.
Effective multi-step reasoning for advanced mathematical problems.
cons: Slower response times compared to other models.
o1.prompting_tips: Provide detailed, context-rich prompts for complex reasoning tasks.

pros: Strong coding capabilities with fast response times.
Balances speed and accuracy in general knowledge tasks.
Efficient creative content generation for everyday tasks.
Quick performance on routine mathematical problems.
cons: May struggle with highly complex or nuanced tasks.
Less effective in highly detailed creative writing.
o3-mini.prompting_tips: Use concise prompts for routine queries to maximize speed and efficiency.
best_use_cases: Standard creative writing and content generation

pros: Enhanced reasoning for more complex coding scenarios.
Maintains high accuracy in information retrieval.
Delivers nuanced and detailed creative outputs.
Improved capability for advanced mathematical reasoning.
cons: Output quality may not fully match o1 in extremely complex tasks.
Requires more computational resources than o3-mini.
o3-mini-high.prompting_tips: Frame prompts that demand deep reasoning to leverage its enhanced capabilities.

pros: Enhanced conversational abilities with improved pattern recognition.
Supports image processing and function calling.
Excels in creative writing with natural, intuitive outputs.
Improved instruction adherence and file handling.
cons: Significantly higher cost compared to other models.
Smaller context window (128K tokens) versus o3-mini's 200K tokens.
